title: soroseris hookeriana subsp. hookeriana
intro: Soroseris hookeriana subsp. hookeriana is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the hooker's soroseris or hooker's crepis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Soroseris hookeriana subsp. hookeriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
